title: charred smoky norwegian datterini-tomato hash
description: a comforting, paleo-friendly dish featuring charred datterini tomatoes, pan-fried until golden and crunchy.
instructions: heat the olive oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat.
add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
add the datterini tomatoes and cook until they start to release their juices, about 2 minutes.
add the smoked paprika and salt, and stir to combine.
use a spatula to break up the tomatoes and create a shaggy texture.
continue cooking for an additional 5-7 minutes, until the tomatoes are charred and golden.
season with additional salt to taste.
serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
